news.headline: QuicksortRx named #1 for Purchasing Optimization Analytics in Best in KLAS 2025 report, boosting health systems' efficiency.
news.summary: In Charleston, South Carolina on February 20, 2025, QuicksortRx, a tech company aiding health systems in minimizing medication expenses and boosting pharmacy operations, has secured the top position for Purchasing Optimization Analytics in the Best in KLAS 2025 evaluation. This recognition signifies QuicksortRx's leadership in the industry, showcasing its effectiveness in improving pharmacy cost management.

news.headline: Avathon chosen by Air Force for AI supply chain tools. Partnering with tech firms for USAF digital shift.
news.summary: In Pleasanton, California, on February 20, 2025, Avathon, a prominent AI platform provider for industrial operations, announced its collaboration with several tech firms to spearhead the digital overhaul of the United States Air Force (USAF). The initiative aims to minimize operational risks by implementing cutting-edge technology solutions.

This comprehensive report offers vital information on market trends for industry stakeholders. It covers in-depth analysis and forecasts for the desiccant dehumidifier market globally. news.headline: Artimus Robotics wins £1.5M UK ARIA Award for robotic hardware development. Exciting progress ahead!
news.summary: Artimus Robotics, based in Boulder, Colorado, has recently secured £1.5 million in funding from the UK government's Advanced Research + Invention Agency (ARIA) on February 20, 2025. This financial backing will be pivotal in driving crucial advancements in Artimus' artificial muscle technology. For more information, visit www.artimusrobotics.com.

news.headline: New educational activities with Fontina cheese PDO launched in 4 Southwest cities in Feb 2025. European initiative.
news.summary: In February 2025, a masterclass began featuring Fontina cheese across four prominent cities in the Southwest region. The campaign, "Landmarks from Europe: Good products made with respect," was launched in New York and Vancouver, BC.

news.headline: Fed's Bostic: I do not expect a new burst of inflation, though uncertainty is widespread.
Fed's Bostic: My overall expectation is for inflation to continue a bumpy decline to 2%, with shelter inflation likely to ease and expectations anchored.
Fed's Bostic: Businesses are optimistic about deregulation, but apprehensive about the impact of tariff and immigration changes.
Icertis named a Leader in Contract Lifecycle Management by Forrester, scoring high in Strategy and various criteria.
news.summary: In Bellevue, Washington, Icertis, a prominent player in AI-driven contract intelligence, has been acknowledged as a frontrunner in The Forrester Wave™ for Contract Lifecycle Management (CLM) Platforms in Q1 2025. With an exceptional ranking in the Strategy section, Icertis achieved the highest scores in Vision, Innovation, Roadmap, Partner Ecosystem, Community, and Usability. As outlined in the Forrester analysis, "Icertis has displayed outstanding leadership in terms of vision."

news.headline: 33.4% of US drivers are uninsured or underinsured in 2023, posing significant financial risks.
news.summary: In a recent study by the Insurance Research Council (IRC), it was found that approximately 33.4% of drivers in the United States were either uninsured or underinsured in 2023. This concerning statistic highlights the large number of individuals on the roads who may not have adequate insurance coverage in the event of an accident.

news.headline: Quanta Services Q4 revenue slightly misses at $6.55B; projects $27.1B revenue in 2025. Costs profit surge.
news.summary: Quanta Services Inc (NYSE:PWR) experienced a decline in its stock value on Thursday following the release of its fourth-quarter financial results. The company reported a total revenue growth of $6.55 billion, which fell short of the anticipated consensus of $6.61 billion. Revenue breakdown by segment reveals Electric Power Infrastructure Solutions generated $3.41 billion compared to $2.46 billion the previous year, Renewable Energy Infrastructure Solutions amounted to $1.98 billion versus $2.03 billion in the prior year, and Underground Utility and Infrastructure Solutions reached $1.17 billion compared to $1.3 billion in the prior-year quarter. Adjusted EBITDA also saw an improvement, rising to $737.8 million from $550.2 million.

news.headline: "Feb. 20, 2025 - Proper dental care crucial for pets' health; issues like plaque, tartar & bad breath can lead to serious conditions."
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, in Mission, Kansas, a report emphasized the significance of maintaining good oral hygiene for pets, as it greatly impacts their health and quality of life. Issues such as plaque, tartar, and halitosis can lead to severe health problems if not addressed promptly. Studies show that approximately (round up number) 80% of pets over the age of three suffer from dental complications, highlighting the need for regular dental care for animals to prevent any consequential health issues.

news.headline: P2P Group's AI Wi-Fi tech matches IoT beacon accuracy without hardware, reducing costs and barriers. (CSE: PPB / FSE: 3QG)
news.summary: Investor@p2p-group.com has recently highlighted the advancements made by (CSE: PPB / FSE: 3QG) in AI-powered Wi-Fi tracking, achieving sub-meter precision in location accuracy. This technology matches the capabilities of costly IoT hardware beacons without the need for any additional hardware. By eliminating the necessity for expensive beacons, batteries, and installations, this innovation effectively reduces Capital Expenditure (CapEx) and lowers barriers to entry.

Uwill wins 2025 EdTech Company of the Year award, recognized for global impact on student mental health.

news.headline: Co-founder of Bombas brand invests in K9 Resorts, signs multi-unit agreement for three resorts in Connecticut. Luxury pet care demand growing rapidly.
news.summary: Experienced entrepreneur becomes part of the renowned dog boarding and daycare franchise operating three resorts in Connecticut. The Fairfield-based K9 Resorts Luxury Pet Hotel has seen a rising interest in upscale pet services. In response to this demand, the franchise is increasing its footprint in Connecticut. The entrepreneur's involvement signifies a strategic move to capitalize on the profitable pet care market.

news.headline: Parents Anonymous, Inc. celebrates 25 years of National Parent Leadership Month recognizing parents' role in families & communities.
news.summary: In acknowledgement of the vital role played by parents within their families and communities, National Parent Leadership Month was established by Parents Anonymous. This celebration was created 25 years ago by Parents Anonymous, Inc. to honor and recognize the contributions of parents. The event aims to highlight the importance of parental leadership and advocacy.

news.headline: Toastmasters International names Stanford lecturer Matt Abrahams as 2025 Golden Gavel recipient.
news.summary: In Englewood, Colorado on February 20, 2025, Toastmasters International revealed that Matt Abrahams, a Stanford Graduate School of Business lecturer, author of two communication-focused books, and host of the Think Fast, Talk Smart podcast, has been honored with the organization's 2025 Golden award.

news.headline: Outrig RV Storage expands in California with new Simi Valley location offering premium amenities. #RVStorage #SimiValley #Expanding
news.summary: Outrig, a prominent RV and boat storage provider, has established a new facility in SIMI VALLEY, Calif. on Feb. 20, 2025. The facility offers outdoor parking, valet service, on-site washes, and premium amenities for RV and boat owners. This expansion showcases Outrig's commitment to servicing California's recreational vehicle market.

news.headline: Credit union in Tennessee, Cornerstone Financial, introduces BNPL to members. Enhances financial flexibility with instant access to extra funds.
news.summary: NASHVILLE, Tenn. - On February 20, 2025, Cornerstone Financial Credit Union introduced Buy Now, Pay Later (BNPL) to cater to members' financial flexibility requirements. The credit union now offers instant access to additional funds to assist members in managing their budget effectively. This initiative aims to provide swift access to funds while ensuring members stay within their budget.

news.headline: Medtronic and Webster Bank among 2025 Corporate Responsibility Award winners by The Conference Board, along with 4 other companies.
news.summary: In an announcement made today in New York, The Conference Board unveiled Medtronic and Webster Bank as winners of the 2025 Corporate Responsibility Awards. They have been recognized alongside AT&T, e.l.f. Beauty, Prudential Financial, and Yum! Brands, Inc as the recipients for this year. This prestigious accolade is given to companies that have showcased exceptional efforts in corporate social responsibility.

news.headline: New Pediatric Emergency Center in Israel to be built by Arison Family Foundation & Save a Child's Heart at Wolfson Medical Center, Holon.
news.summary: In Holon, Israel, on February 20, 2025, the Arison family and the Ted Arison Family Foundation, alongside senior officials from Wolfson Medical Center and the Save a Child's Heart organization, gathered for the cornerstone laying ceremony of the Arison Pediatric Emergency Medicine Center. This event marks a significant step towards the completion of this new medical facility.

news.headline: Krypton market expected to reach USD 0.6 billion by 2030 with 5.2% CAGR, according to Verified Market Reports®.

Key statistics and data are presented to assist in decision-making, with a focus on the global landscape.

news.headline: Fayafi Investment Holding selects Ferrari Logistics DMCC as custodian for its high-value isotope copper reserves. Dubai, UAE, Feb 20, 2025.
news.summary: Fayafi Investment Holding based in Dubai, UAE, announced on February 20, 2025, its commitment to safeguarding and managing the secure storage, handling, and global transportation of an exceedingly rare metal critical for scientific purposes. This marks a significant development as Fayafi Investment Holding becomes the initial UAE company accessible via a secure bankable certificate granted under the SIX Swiss Exchange platform. The company's efforts are geared towards ensuring the protection and safe transportation of this invaluable metal, essential for various scientific applications.

news.headline: Bantam Pharmaceutical activates first Phase 1 trial site at MD Anderson Cancer Center, targeting mitochondrial dynamics in cancer.
news.summary: Bantam Pharmaceutical, a company specializing in drug discovery and development focusing on selectively modifying mitochondrial dynamics in cancer, has revealed the initiation of its initial clinical trial site at The University of Texas MD. The news was announced on February 20, 2025 from Research Triangle Park, North Carolina. The company aims to assess the effectiveness of its research in combating cancer.

news.headline: China loyalty programs market projected to reach US$19.63 billion by 2025 with 16.1% annual growth, dominated by tech giants.
news.summary: A new report titled "China Loyalty Programs Market Intelligence and Future Growth Dynamics" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The loyalty market in China is projected to see a 16.1% annual growth, reaching a value of US$19.63 billion by 2025. From 2020 to 2024, China's loyalty market experienced a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 18.1% in value terms. The report covers over 50 Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) on loyalty program trends across various end-use sectors, operational KPIs, retail product dynamics, and consumer demographics.

news.headline: Kaia Health partners with Vira Health, offering Pelvic Floor Therapy in their Women's Health Program, aiding millions.
news.summary: A new Women's Health Program has been launched in New York on February 20, 2025, in collaboration with Vira Health, offering integrated services for pelvic floor therapy and menopause care. The program aims to address the struggles faced by millions of women dealing with postpartum recovery, menopause, or pelvic floor dysfunction, causing daily pain and hindering work productivity. Through this partnership, women will have access to specialized care and support to alleviate their symptoms and improve their quality of life.

This thorough report delves into the dynamic global industry landscape of pneumatic conveying systems. With a detailed analysis of market trends, opportunities, and forecasts, this report offers valuable insights into the market.

news.headline: Functional unemployment down to 23.3% from 23.7% in January, but still 0.3% higher than last year; living-wage employment differs between races.
news.summary: In January 2025, the rate of "functional unemployment" saw a slight improvement of 0.4 percentage points, dropping from 23.7% to 23.3%. However, this figure is still 0.3 percentage points higher compared to the previous year. The data reveals a contrasting trend between different racial groups, as living-wage employment showed positive developments for White workers but worsened for Black and Hispanic earners.

news.headline: Valortiva, founded in 2024 by Howard, Alex, and Annie, enhances modern lifestyles with premium sound.
news.summary: In Rowland Heights, California, on February 20, 2025, it was reported that in 2024, a trio consisting of Howard, Alex, and Annie collaborated on the idea that music transcends mere auditory sensations, emphasizing its profound emotional impact. They emphasized that music intertwines with significant experiences, influencing memories, sentiments, and daily life.

news.headline: Trump proposes a 20% 'dividend' payment, while DOGE savings discrepancies remain unaddressed. Clerical errors conceded, not updated in records.
news.summary: DOGE has acknowledged errors in its estimated savings figures, with critics noting that these discrepancies have not been accurately documented.

news.headline: New 50% fee sharing referral program by Arkham Exchange. Newly referred users get $50 rebate on trading fees for 30 days.
news.summary: Arkham Exchange has unveiled a fresh referral initiative with the potential to earn users up to 50% in fee sharing commissions. Under this program, newly referred users stand to benefit from a $50 rebate on their trading fees during the first month of their subscription. This initiative aims to enhance user engagement and bolster the platform's user base through lucrative incentives.

news.headline: Grab reported Q4 2024 revenue of $764M, up 17% YoY, beating estimates. EPS $0.01. $512M total incentives. Stock price dropped post-results.
news.summary: Grab Holdings (NASDAQ:GRAB) announced a 17% year-on-year revenue growth to $764.00 million in the fourth quarter of fiscal 2024 (15% on a constant currency basis), surpassing the expected $757.61 million. The EPS of $0.01 exceeded the projected loss of $(0.01). Despite this, the stock price dropped following the results. Total incentives for the quarter amounted to $512 million, with On-Demand incentives representing 10.1% of On-Demand GMV, up from 9.4% in the same period of 2023. Moreover, Grab plans to incorporate over 1,000 BYD EVs into their Indonesian fleet for eco-friendly rides, following a similar approach to Uber. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: HF Sinclair Corp reported mixed Q4 2024 results with a 93% drop in adjusted EBITDA to $28M. Revenue declined 195% to $6.5B, net loss of $191M or $1.02 per share. Refining segment EBITDA dropped to $169M from $276M due to lower margins. Adjusted gross margins fell 51% to $6.68 per barrel.
news.summary: HF Sinclair Corporation (NYSE:DINO) stock is down following its fourth-quarter 2024 results, which showed an adjusted net loss of $191 million, equivalent to a $1.02 loss per share. This was below Wall Street's expectation of a 90-cent loss. The company's fourth-quarter revenue was $6.5 billion, a 195.14% decrease from the previous year but surpassing the consensus of $6.19 billion. Adjusted EBITDA dropped by 93.5% year-over-year to $28 million, with a margin decline of 516 basis points to 0.43%. The refining segment's Adjusted EBITDA decreased to $169 million from $276 million, attributed to lower refinery margins due to high fuel supply and reduced sales. Adjusted refinery gross margins also fell by 51% to $6.68 per barrel.

news.headline: US VP Vance: I believe we are on the cusp of peace in Europe.
Global GSSSB market to hit $2,047.6B by 2033 at 7.5% CAGR from $976B in 2023, per Allied Market Research report. Impacts from tech advancements noted.
news.summary: The article discusses a report by Allied Market Research on the "Green, Social, Sustainability, and Sustainability-linked Bond (GSSSB) Market." The market was valued at $976 billion in 2023 and is projected to reach $2,047.6 billion by 2033, with a growth rate of 7.5% from 2024 to 2033. The report covers segments such as Type, Issuer, Industry, Investor, and Region. It highlights that technological advancements will drive market growth, but challenges like high transaction costs and economic uncertainty may hinder it. The report provides an in-depth analysis and forecasts for the period from 2024 to 2033.

news.headline: Commercial National Financial Corp(NASDAQ: CEFC) declares a quarterly dividend of 14 cents per share, with an annual yield of 5.11%.
news.summary: In Ithaca, Michigan on February 20, 2025, the Commercial National Financial Corporation (Pink Sheets: CEFC) disclosed that the Board of Directors approved a standard quarterly cash dividend of 14 cents per share. Shareholders of record on March 14, 2025, will receive the dividend on April 1, 2025. This announcement implies an annualized dividend yield of 5.11% based on a recent closing share price of $10.95.

news.headline: Medical Facilities Corporation will report Q4 2024 financial results on March 13, 2025 at 8:30am ET. TSX: DR.
news.summary: Medical Facilities Corporation (TSX: DR) will disclose its quarterly and annual financial results for 2024 on March 13, 2025, before the market opens. The financial statements and discussion for the three and twelve months ending on December 31, 2024, will be accessible on SEDAR+ at www.sedarplus.ca and the company's website, www.medicalfacilitiescorp.ca, on the same day following the announcement. An earnings conference call will be led by management to assess the financial outcomes at 8:30 a.m. ET. For the earnings call dial-in information, please refer to the full article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: American Land Holdings (ALH) announces a one-day waterfront land sale at Lake Ridge on Wilson Lake in Muscle Shoals, Ala with lots starting at $59,900, happening on April 12.
news.summary: In Charlottesville, Virginia, American Land Holdings (ALH), a prominent wholesale recreational waterfront development company, is set to launch a grand opening waterfront land sale for Lake Ridge, a fresh development situated on Wilson Lake near Muscle Shoals, Alabama. The event is scheduled for Saturday, April 12, with lake lots available starting at $59,900. This one-time event offers prospective buyers the opportunity to purchase waterfront and expansive acreage for future development.

news.headline: Fraudulent woman sentenced to 10 years in prison after scamming Bybit for $4.2 million.
Magnera to present at JP Morgan’s Global Leveraged Finance Conference in Miami Beach on Feb 25, 2025 at 5:15 p.m. CEO and CFO to participate.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, Magnera (NYSE: MAGN) announced their attendance at JP Morgan’s Global Leveraged Finance Conference in Miami Beach, Florida. CEO Curt Begle and CFO & Treasurer Jim Till will be representing the company on Thursday, February 25, 2025, at 5:15 p.m. EST.

news.headline: Global TBR tire market set to hit USD 29BN by 2031, growing at 6.7% CAGR, driven by e-commerce surge and smart tire tech. Major players include Bridgestone, Goodyear, and Hankook; strategic initiatives are focusing on acquisitions, sustainability, and product innovation.
news.summary: The global Truck and Bus Radial (TBR) tire market was valued at US$ 14.9 Billion in 2021, and it is projected to grow at a CAGR of 6.7% from 2022 to 2031, reaching US$ 29.0 Billion by the end of 2031. This growth is fueled by factors such as the increasing demand for heavy-duty vehicles, expanding e-commerce, and advancements in tire manufacturing technology. The demand for TBR tires is expected to rise steadily due to factors like favorable trade agreements, increased awareness about vehicle maintenance, and the adoption of tire monitoring systems. Key players in the market include Apollo Tyres, Bridgestone Corporation, Continental AG, among others, who are investing in digital stores and smart tire technologies to cater to the increasing demand for TBR tires. Recent developments in the market include the closure of Bridgestone Americas' plant, Goodyear's acquisition of Cooper Tire, and Hankook's launch of a TBR tire for electric vehicles. Key industry strategies for growth include product innovation and strategic partnerships. Such initiatives are aimed at strengthening market positions and meeting evolving consumer demands.

news.headline: NTT DATA launches Smart AI Agent™ to drive $2 billion revenue by 2027, accelerating Generative AI adoption.
news.summary: NTT DATA, a leading global provider of digital business and IT services, revealed the worldwide release of its innovative Smart AI Agent™ in Tokyo. The cutting-edge AI tool plays a pivotal role in NTT DATA's plan to expedite Generative AI uptake, targeting a revenue goal of approximately $2 billion by 2027 from Smart AI Agent™-related ventures. This autonomous platform is designed to extract, categorize, and perform tasks based on user commands, enhancing user experience and operational efficiency.

news.headline: 60 Degrees Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (SXTP) will undergo a 1:5 reverse stock split on Feb. 24, 2025 to meet Nasdaq's $1.00 bid price.
news.summary: The pharmaceutical company 60 Degrees Pharma (SXTP) has declared a reverse stock split of 1-for-5, which will be implemented on February 24, 2025. This move is intended to ensure compliance with Nasdaq's minimum bid price requirement of $1.00 per share.
